# MYOUKEE (myoukee.com)

> MYOUKEE is an AI-powered karaoke platform that turns any song into karaoke. Upload any audio or video file, or paste a YouTube link, and the AI removes vocals, transcribes lyrics with word-level timing, and generates a professional karaoke video — all automatically. Supports 14 languages including Hebrew, Arabic, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Russian, French, German, Thai, Vietnamese, Filipino, and Indonesian.

## Core Features

- **AI Vocal Remover**: Removes vocals from any song using deep learning, producing clean instrumental tracks.
- **Karaoke from Any Song**: Automatically generates karaoke videos with synced lyrics from any audio/video file.
- **YouTube to Karaoke**: Paste a YouTube link and get an instant karaoke version with lyrics.
- **Lyrics Sync**: AI-powered word-level lyrics synchronization with manual editing support.
- **Singing Score**: Real-time AI scoring of vocal performances based on pitch accuracy and timing.
- **AI Vocal Coach**: Personalized singing tips and progress tracking powered by AI analysis.
- **Background Changer**: Choose from multiple visual themes (aurora, neon, etc.) or upload your own image as a karaoke video background.
- **Party Mode**: Multiplayer karaoke rooms with Solo, Duet, and Battle modes. Create or join rooms with a 6-digit code. Includes TV Display mode for big screens.
- **Social Feed**: Discover and follow other singers, like and comment on performances.
- **Weekly Challenges**: Competitive singing challenges with leaderboards and credit prizes.
- **XP & Badges**: Gamification system with levels, achievements, and daily streaks.
- **Leaderboard**: Global rankings based on singing scores and XP.
- **Referral Program**: Invite friends and earn rewards.
- **Recording Library**: Save and manage your singing recordings.

## Supported Languages (14)

English, Hebrew (עברית), Arabic (العربية), Russian (Русский), Spanish (Español), French (Français), German (Deutsch), Japanese (日本語), Chinese (中文), Korean (한국어), Thai (ไทย), Vietnamese (Tiếng Việt), Filipino, Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)

RTL support for Hebrew and Arabic.

## Pricing

Credit-based system. No subscription required.
- Starter: 10 credits — $4.99
- Popular: 40 credits — $14.99
- Pro: 120 credits — $34.99
- Studio: 500 credits — $99.99

Payment via Stripe and PayPal.

## Technology

- AI-powered vocal separation (deep learning)
- Word-level lyrics transcription and synchronization
- Real-time singing analysis (pitch and timing)
- Multi-language support with automatic language detection
- WebSocket-based real-time party mode
- Progressive Web App (PWA) with mobile app (iOS/Android via Expo)
